disambiguation_rules.director: Resolved to Director of the National Science Foundation per SEC. 2(4)

oddities.note: SEC. 2 is entirely definitional, establishing meaning for 21 distinct terms. SEC. 3 begins substantive provisions. This definitional section relies heavily on cross-references to other federal statutes rather than defining terms self-contained within this Act.

llm_disambiguation_log.resolved: Resolved to Director of the National Science Foundation per SEC. 2(4)
